calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-07-2010 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
Appearances:
Michael Rossoff, Esq. for and present with the Plaintiff Joseph Fuentes.
Eric Lifschitz, Esq., through limited scope, for and with the Defendants: Emilio Ramirez and Maria Gallo.
This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
The Judge Pro Tem: Ernst Halperin, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions in Dept. 207.
The parties enter into a signed agreement "Stipulation for entry of Judgment or Dismissal with prejudice", which was NOT filed.
Case settled and matter is taken off the TRIAL calendar.
